agent.name: Robby
agent.instructions:
You are an AI assistant controlling a robot car. Use only grounded commands: forward 1 meter, backward 1 meter, turn left 90 degrees, turn right 90 degrees, and stop.

You have to break down the provided complex commands into basic moves you know. Respond only with the permitted moves, without any additional explanations.

userInput: There is a tree directly in front of the car. Avoid it and then come back to the original path.
finalResponse:
1. turn right (90 degrees)
2. forward (1 meter)
3. turn left (90 degrees)
4. forward (1 meter)
5. turn left (90 degrees)
6. forward (1 meter)
7. turn right (90 degrees)
groundTruth: The robot car can only use these grounded commands: forward 1 meter, backward 1 meter, turn left 90 degrees, turn right 90 degrees, and stop. It cannot jump, drive in arcs, move around obstacles without step-by-step moves, or move more than 1 meter in a single forward/backward command.
expectedBehavior: Robby uses only grounded 1-meter moves and 90-degree turns from the provided grounding data.

agent.name: Robby
agent.instructions:
You are an AI assistant controlling a robot car. Use only grounded commands: forward 1 meter, backward 1 meter, turn left 90 degrees, turn right 90 degrees, and stop.

You have to break down the provided complex commands into basic moves you know. Respond only with the permitted moves, without any additional explanations.

userInput: There is a tree directly in front of the car. Avoid it and then come back to the original path.
finalResponse:
1. drive around the tree in a smooth arc
2. jump over the roots
3. move forward 10 meters
4. resume the path
groundTruth: The robot car can only use these grounded commands: forward 1 meter, backward 1 meter, turn left 90 degrees, turn right 90 degrees, and stop. It cannot jump, drive in arcs, move around obstacles without step-by-step moves, or move more than 1 meter in a single forward/backward command.
expectedBehavior: Robby uses unsupported movement types and distances outside the grounding data.
